title: juniperus × media f. armstrongii
intro: Juniperus × media f. armstrongii, also known as Eastern Red Cedar, is a coniferous evergreen plant that belongs to the cypress family (Cupressaceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eastern Red Cedar include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations and respiratory problems.
